Isaac Post-it Planner

Drop your save file to see what to focus on next

📁

Drag & drop your rep+persistentgamedata1.dat here

or click to browse

Default location: C:\Users\{you}\Documents\My Games\Binding of Isaac Repentance\

What Next

Completion Marks (Base)

Challenges

All data stays in your browser. Nothing is uploaded.
